parameters.content:
Nel nodo **Get Prompt** 
Inserisci nel filtro la PromptVersion che vuoi testare
Su Execute Workflow seleziona il Test Agent con la versione che vuoi testare

parameters.query: INSERT INTO test_runs (test_run_code, prompt_version_id, mode, max_iterations, current_iteration, tool_scenario_id, test_config, llm_config, status) VALUES ('{{ $json.test_run_code }}', '{{ $json.prompt_version_id }}'::uuid, '{{ $json.mode }}', {{ $json.max_iterations }}, 1, NULLIF('{{ $json.tool_scenario_id }}', ''), '{}'::jsonb, '{"battleLlm": "gpt-4.1-mini", "evaluatorLlm": "claude-sonnet-4"}'::jsonb, 'running') RETURNING id, test_run_code
SELECT id, prompt_name, version, content, status FROM prompt_versions WHERE id = '{{ $('Validate Input').item.json.prompt_version_id }}'::uuid

SELECT p.id, p.personaid, p.name, p.personaprompt, p.category, pp.priority
FROM personas p
JOIN prompt_personas pp ON p.id = pp.persona_id
JOIN prompts pr ON pp.prompt_id = pr.id
JOIN prompt_versions pv ON pv.prompt_id = pr.id
WHERE pv.id = $1::uuid
  AND pp.is_active = true
  AND p.validation_status = 'validated'
ORDER BY pp.priority, p.category
SELECT status FROM test_runs WHERE test_run_code = '{{ $('Set Test Run').item.json.test_run_code }}' LIMIT 1
UPDATE test_runs SET status = 'battles_completed', last_heartbeat_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Set Test Run').item.json.test_run_id }}'::uuid RETURNING id, status
SELECT id, criteria, llm_config FROM evaluator_configs WHERE id = '{{ $('Set Test Run').item.json.evaluator_config_id }}'::uuid

INSERT INTO evaluations (test_run_id, evaluator_config_id, status, triggered_by, criteria_snapshot, llm_config_snapshot) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, 'pending', 'auto', $3::jsonb, $4::jsonb) RETURNING id

options.queryReplacement: ={{ $('Set Test Run').item.json.test_run_id }},{{ $('Set Test Run').item.json.evaluator_config_id }},{{ JSON.stringify($('Get Evaluator Config').item.json.criteria) }},{{ JSON.stringify($('Get Evaluator Config').item.json.llm_config) }}

FROM personas p

UPDATE test_runs SET status = 'battles_completed', last_heartbeat_at = NOW() WHERE id = '{{ $('Set Test Run').item.json.test_run_id }}'::uuid RETURNING id, status

INSERT INTO evaluations (test_run_id, evaluator_config_id, status, triggered_by, criteria_snapshot, llm_config_snapshot) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2::uuid, 'pending', 'auto', $3::jsonb, $4::jsonb) RETURNING id
